title: cordia stenoclada
intro: Cordia stenoclada, also known as the 'Kahili flower' or 'Wishbone Flower', is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cordia stenoclada include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
